examples: He is a staunch supporter of amateurism in intercollegiate athletics.
We met in the final of the next big intercollegiate tournament, and though I had an early lead, he won in three sets.
Columbia University sponsors 29 intercollegiate teams competing in the Ivy League in NCAA Division I (I-AA for football).
The Intercollegiate Studies Institute, the Young America's Foundation and the Federalist Society are out organising.
Also, students with lower academic prowess valued the success of intercollegiate athletics for longer periods of time than the high SAT achievers.
